     "clean": "rm -rf node_modules @claude-flow/*/node_modules",
     "publish:dry": "pnpm -r publish --dry-run --no-git-checks",
     "publish:alpha": "pnpm -r publish --tag alpha --no-git-checks",

     "publish:latest": "pnpm -r publish --no-git-checks",
     "version:patch": "pnpm -r exec npm version patch",
     "version:minor": "pnpm -r exec npm version minor",
